posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey folks,

For those running outbound sales teams, Kixie is an awesome tool that integrates with monday.com.

  • One-click power dialing right from your workflow.
  • Local presence dialing (so prospects see a familiar area code).
  • Calls logged automatically into your boards.
  • Combine with automations to trigger follow-ups after every conversation.

It’s designed to help sales teams connect faster and close deals more efficiently.

Check out Kixie here!
